selections.name: Prestige Austria
selections.reason: Trial winner drawn perfectly in barrier 1. Stephen & Jordan Lee trained filly ready to strike on debut.

selections.name: Land Speed
selections.reason: Resuming from a spell but trialled well at Gold Coast. Good draw and can feature.

selections.name: Sneaky Bid
selections.reason: Finished 4th on debut at Grafton and will strip fitter for this assignment.

selections.name: Here's Beau
selections.reason: First starter who was runner-up in a recent Grafton trial. Market watch advised.

danger_horse.name: Here's Beau
danger_horse.reason: Trial form suggests ability, could surprise on debut.

selections.name: Listing Capital
selections.reason: Consistent form with two recent placings. Ready to break through third-up.

selections.name: Navy Kiss
selections.reason: Tony Gollan trained 3yo who finished a close 2nd at Beaudesert last start. Major player.

selections.name: Adequate Eze
selections.reason: Fitter for first-up run and has placed at this track previously.

selections.name: Devine Squire (NZ)
selections.reason: Made good ground for 3rd at Gold Coast last start. Drawn well in barrier 1.

danger_horse.name: Devine Squire (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: Peaking third-up and gets a soft run from the inside gate.

selections.name: Satin And Cash
selections.reason: Rock hard fit and has been racing consistently. Looks ready to break the maiden.

selections.name: Vostokova
selections.reason: Placed previously first-up and trialled well recently. Can run a bold race.

selections.name: Video Vixen
selections.reason: Made good headway last start for 3rd at Ipswich. Should be in the finish.

selections.name: Queen Of Light (NZ)
selections.reason: Second at Ipswich last start and will take great benefit from that run.

danger_horse.name: Queen Of Light (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: Strong second last start indicates she is close to a win.

selections.name: Dance Gavin Dance
selections.reason: Won well at this track and distance two starts back. Well placed to score again.

selections.name: Deep Stealth
selections.reason: Consistent mare with two recent seconds. Drawn well and will be right in the finish.

selections.name: The Lupercal
selections.reason: Form is hard to fault and gets the inside draw. Must be respected.

selections.name: Hayley's Rocket
selections.reason: Third-up and has won at this stage of the prep previously. Minor claims.

danger_horse.name: Hayley's Rocket
danger_horse.reason: Proven third-up performer who can improve sharply.

selections.name: Prestige Ice
selections.reason: Going better than most here with two solid placings recently. The one to beat despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Law Marshal
selections.reason: Won well at Ipswich two starts back. Drawn perfectly in barrier 1.

selections.name: Calvary
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten at Beaudesert last start. Ready to peak third-up.

selections.name: High Voltage (NZ)
selections.reason: Fitter for two runs back and can improve from a good draw.

danger_horse.name: Calvary
danger_horse.reason: Just missed last start and is ready to win.

selections.name: Too Hot To Torque
selections.reason: Racing in great form with a win and a second recently. Looks the testing material.

selections.name: Jukebox In Siberia
selections.reason: Won well at Grafton last start and gets the inside draw to feature again.

selections.name: Bring Me Saki
selections.reason: Won nicely at Grafton two starts back. Can bounce back to form here.

selections.name: Vixenette
selections.reason: Fitter for first-up run and has placed second-up previously. Keep safe.

danger_horse.name: Bring Me Saki
danger_horse.reason: Capable of a much better performance on his best form.

selections.name: On My Command
selections.reason: Promising mare who won on debut and followed up with a solid second. Top chance.

selections.name: Private Showtime
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten at Beaudesert last start. Capable of figuring in the finish.

selections.name: Storm Merchant
selections.reason: Racing well with recent placings. Wide draw is a concern but has the ability.

selections.name: Lofty Macsporran
selections.reason: Won well at Grafton two starts back. Can return to winning form.

danger_horse.name: Private Showtime
danger_horse.reason: Close second last start shows she is ready to strike.
